name: Character Creator
description: Reallusions 3D character design hub for games and film. Generates rigged, morph-ready humanoid characters with hair, clothing, and skin shaders for Unity and Unreal export.

seo.title: Character Creator — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Character Creator: Reallusions 3D character design hub for games and film. Generates rigged, morph-ready humanoid characters with hair, clothing, and skin shade

when_to_use: Rigged humanoid hero character exported to Unity with LODs
Morph-ready NPC variations generated from a single base mesh
Game-ready character with PBR skin shaders for Unreal 5
Modular costume system for a character customization screen
Cinematic character rendered for game trailer production

pros: Generates fully rigged, game-ready humanoids in minutes
Direct pipelines into Unity, Unreal, Blender, and iClone
Morph sliders produce wide variety without manual sculpting
Marketplace adds clothing, hair, and motion quickly
cons: Output characters have a recognizable Reallusion look
Per-seat and asset licensing gets expensive fast
Performance on low-end hardware can be sluggish
Stylized or non-human characters need heavy modification
review.verdict: Fastest route to rigged humanoid heroes and NPCs, but your game will look like every other CC4 project.
review.best_for: Small studios shipping realistic humanoid characters without a full rigging team
review.not_for: Stylized, creature-heavy, or art-direction-forward games needing unique silhouettes
